title: Worca Pipeline Learn Events
description: Events for the LEARN stage that runs post-pipeline analysis (2 events).

oneOf.title: pipeline.learn.completed
oneOf.description: Emitted when the learn stage completes successfully and saves learnings.

termination_type.description: How the pipeline terminated before learn ran (success, failure, loop_exhausted).

duration_ms.description: Time spent in the learn stage in milliseconds.

learnings_path.description: Path to the learnings.json file, or null if not saved.

oneOf.title: pipeline.learn.failed
oneOf.description: Emitted when the learn stage encounters an error (non-fatal to the pipeline).

error.description: Error message from the learn stage.

duration_ms.description: Time spent in the learn stage before failure in milliseconds.
